column1: # steelreuse rule table: default ASTM grade for an ungraded AISC designation
# source: common US construction defaults — A992 for hot-rolled W/M/S/WT/MT/ST shapes
# source: Applied only to AISC-named members that carry no grade (EN members are left untouched and
# source: always flagged in the report). Order is PRIORITY — the first matching prefix wins
# source: multi-letter prefixes (HSS/WT/MT/ST/MC/HP) must precede the single-letter ones.
